name: lateral-reading-skill
description: Assess articles, posts, claims, and screenshots with lateral reading and sentence-level URL citations.

interface.shortDescription: Assess claims with cited lateral reading
interface.longDescription: Extract an article, post, claim, URL, or screenshot into a target text file, assess it with lateral reading, produce sentence-level cited JSON, and render an HTML report.
defaultPrompt: Use $lateral-reading to assess this article or claim.
